message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Christmas 2 (Secret Santa Games 2025) - Day 6 or 7
no coughing today eh, things are looking up
hey Echo! haven't seen you since last stream, you're still on this save?
awww did you accidentally doublejump over the floor
if you potentially express just slight disappointment in very fast German I'm sure it'll come across as a hate comment
unfortunately in this specific situation that doesn't work because like, Plasma
D: i cant believe you would say that
cant put the translation in chat, dont wanna get banned
German and Spanish are the two languages where like, if you wanna sound angry all you gotta do is talk fast
sending Echo to sensitivity training right now
I actually basically don't curse at all in English
that's apply more in german more than spanish
in spanish you can use almost any object as a insult when you are angry
I basically don't curse at all… one have to anger me so much for me to actually curse
i remember back in the day when i first got on the internet i didnt curse at all and my friends on xbox live kept trying to get me to curse
so eventually my English got corrupted but my German is still untouched
that's funny plasma because to get around being in a place where potentially children could be but still cursing I do it exclusively in German lmfao
I only got called out on this because my former manager also did this
but i mean this is a good thing for work etc haha
I've dropped my fair share of scheiße
cursing in German feels so wrong
the most ill say is like "Mist" usually
I saw a video on Bluesky of the German Wii Sports Resort Golf long play getting a hole in one with "Ass" coming up to celebrate
whenever you get an ace in a shooter you are getting Ass

I did some etymology connecting recently and figured out the reason Blow Game is called that is because it's meant to be like "The Fatal Blow That Kills You" and I would like to propose a German maker here do the same concept just so we can have I Wanna Conquer The Ass Game
lmao i was always curious why it was called that
my life has been enriched by this information
that makes it so much funnier
Enjoying the stream? Join the discord to have a chat on days I am not streaming:   https://discord.gg/UsXjRQU
crazy that was made for secret santa tho
i also did not know there was more
secret santa makers try not to make a multiple ending arg secret hunt challenge:
speaking of more content, did you see the whole ARG stuff in the Elf game?
I was playing I wanna play an adventure game
to Gaphodil, a.k.a. "In the spirit of Christmas"
yeah that starts off a whole ARG
there is way more after that (no more gameplay though)
yeah Plasma, Gaph, and I spent like a few days solving it together
we did it as a group because it took the 3 of us (+Pyure's video) to realize it existed
theres a whole bunch of stuff with decrypting messages etc
i still have not played Barbuta

this is because Plasma got jumpscared, causing me to comment on it in roulette, causing Gaph to notice the image, causing her and I to solve it, causing me to message plasma if he found it, causing him to join in with us, causing all 3 of us to get underwhelmed when it was just an advertisement for "Carnage Crop" 😔😔
yeah i gave elf a 1/10 on delfruit temporarily
the maker said they were surprised we solved it as fast as we did, but like once we noticed the image existed there were only like 4 major steps? I think?
because of the jumpscare / screamer, it was so loud it physically hurt my ears
maker patched it so not i gave it a 9 i think?
btw it was bugged for plasma and froze on the jumpscare
it was supposed to close after a second, like in Pyure's video
but instead plasma had to task manager it
yeah i had to end it with task manager while the screamer was blasting
that's a crazy bug to have happen btw
especially on the computer of the notoriously good computered maker
i still think it is stupid that there is a jumpscare at all
like it's funny on its own but it's even funnier it's on the PC of the maker of "Your computer isn't high enough specs for this, entering low quality mode"
the freezing is funny, not the jumpscare
@alicenobodi i mean that basically just means you own a GPU lol
i mean a screamer not a jumpscare
screamers dont belong in games that dont advertise themselves as having screamers
i deal with it alright but i know people that would genuinely mess up
Good luck echo, may the Santas bring you hoy
it did the Disney Channel wand thing
that ? is doing a lot of heavy lifting
yeah makes sense, its a little like the penultimate save in 2.5 which you didnt like that much but chatran said it was probably his favorite fangame save ever made
that is not what you do for the secret btw
chatran has a video if you wanna see the rest
now we can use reactbot for his intended purpose LUL

player doesnt have to worry about the timing at all

i overworked myself like crazy during that week
its about the same amount of content id say
